summary: A social media app called 'Deeds' focused on acts of kindness. Users can perform and share deeds, receive kindness matches, and interact with others. Key features include Memory Jars (personal scrapbook of saved deeds), Profile Report Card (AI-generated weekly peer review with user-chosen grading scale), Deeds Bar (19-hour daily tracker with floating icons and light baby blue lightning background, shown only on profile page), a lock screen overlay when daily limit is reached, profile picture and status options, and AI-generated deed categories.
architectural_notes: App is called 'Deeds' — a social media platform focused on acts of kindness and human connection.
Deeds Bar (19-hour tracker) is shown only on the user's own profile page, not globally.
known_issues: Memory Jars feature not appearing in current build
Profile page showing nothing when clicked
Deed categories not loading on the Deeds page
imageRequirements:
## Required Images
- Cartoon bear head icon with friendly expression on transparent background (bear-icon.dim_128x128.png)
- Cartoon pineapple character head icon on transparent background (pineapple-icon.dim_128x128.png)
- Cartoon monkey head icon with playful expression on transparent background (monkey-icon.dim_128x128.png)
- Light baby blue abstract lightning bolt pattern background tile (lightning-bg.dim_800x400.png)

existing_features.title: Fix the Memory Jars feature so it appears and functions correctly: users can save deeds from others into a personal scrapbook, toggle public/private visibility, and the original poster is notified when their deed is saved.

Fix the Profile page so it loads and displays correctly: show the user's avatar, posts, albums, follower/following counts, notifications, memory jar, profile picture upload option, and status update option.

Fix deed categories on the Deeds/feed page: implement AI-style random category assignment so that when a user creates a post, category options are dynamically generated and displayed for selection rather than failing to load.

Implement the Profile Report Card feature: a weekly summary card on the user's profile that reflects their own activity stats (posts made, deeds completed, likes received, etc.) with a user-selectable grading scale (letter grade A-F, star rating 1-5, or percentage 0-100%). The report card has a public/private toggle.

Implement the Deeds Bar on the profile page: a 19-hour daily activity tracker displayed only on the profile page, showing floating bear, pineapple, and monkey head icons against a light baby blue lightning-bolt background, tracking daily app usage progress.

Implement a lock screen overlay that appears on every page when the user reaches the 19-hour daily usage limit. The overlay displays a message about the daily limit and requires the user to click any bold letter in the terms/acceptance text to dismiss and continue.

new_feature_requests.summary: Memory Jars: personal scrapbook of saved deeds from others, public/private setting, notify original poster when deed is saved
Profile Report Card: AI-generated weekly options for peer review, reflects own activity stats, user chooses letter/star/percentage grading, public/private setting
Deeds Bar on profile page: 19-hour daily tracker, floating bear/pineapple/monkey head icons, light baby blue lightning background
Lock screen overlay when 19-hour daily limit is reached, shown on every page; user can click any bold letter to accept terms and continue
Profile page: profile picture upload and status option
AI-generated deed categories: built-in AI randomly decides category options on the Deeds page
